pageSubtitle: Manage projects, broadcast, and view action logs

empty.noMatch: No projects match the search criteria

renderUrl.title: OBS Browser Source URL (click to copy)

guide.title: Controller Guide
guide.intro: A numbered operating checklist for setup, live playout, checking, collaboration, and recovery.
prepItems: Copy the **renderer URL** into an OBS browser source.
Open the controller and verify the first broadcast graphic in **PVW**.
Use **←/→ and Ctrl+wheel** to check block edges and missing graphics.
liveItems: **Space**: send the current playhead graphic to PGM and the renderer.
**↑**: return to the last broadcast point.
Use **progress counters and ▲ markers** to track aired, skipped, and remaining items.
scrubItems: **S**: enter scrubbing mode and inspect the timeline privately.
**Space is blocked while scrubbing** to prevent accidental playout.
Press **S** again to return to normal playout control.
multiItems: Treat the **last sender** as the primary operator reference.
Supporting users should use **scrubbing** to check upcoming graphics.
If positions drift, press **↑** to align to the last broadcast point.
recoverItems: Restored **PGM is not resent automatically** while live.
**Del** deletion also adjusts playhead and last broadcast position.
guide.prepSummary: Connect the renderer URL and verify PVW first.
guide.liveSummary: Send with Space and verify against the last broadcast marker.
guide.scrubSummary: Inspect upcoming states without affecting live output.
guide.multiSummary: Keep one playout reference and let others inspect safely.
guide.recoverSummary: After Undo/Redo, confirm whether live output should be resent.
